ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial metric (e.g., Total Revenue, Operating Revenue) */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the financial metric */,
  "metric_category" TEXT /* Category of the financial metric (e.g., Revenue, Expenses) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial metric */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the data entry */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric for the specified year */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the year (Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4) */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the year (01, 02, 03, etc.) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the value is reported (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "source_data_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the source_data table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES financial_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_source_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_data_id") REFERENCES source_data ("source_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, executive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, viewer) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of the permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role and its responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial metric related to the alert */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for triggering the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., increase, decrease) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who triggered the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Annual, Quarterly) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last date and time the report was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_metrics" (
  "report_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry in report metrics association */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated report */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated financial metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric at the time of report generation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES financial_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_metrics_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who receives the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Whether the notification has been read (e.g., unread, read) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., alert, report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., ERP system) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL or endpoint of the data source */,
  "source_status" TEXT /* Current status of the data source (e.g., active, down) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "source_data" (
  "source_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source data entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source the data comes from */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated in the source */,
  "data_status" TEXT /* Status of the data (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_source_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_source_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial metric */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the historical data entry */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric for the specified year */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the year (Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4) */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the year (01, 02, 03, etc.) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the value is reported (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES financial_metrics ("metric_id")
)
